summary: Iteration 30: Tested 'Preencher depois' skip button and category icons. All features working correctly. Backend: Categories return Ionicons-compatible names, establishment creation with empty address works. Frontend: Skip button navigates to Dashboard without validation, category icons display correctly, Dashboard shows 'Meu Perfil' and 'Solicitar Resgate' as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/categories returns Ionicons-compatible icon names (all ending in -outline)
Backend: POST /api/establishments creates establishment with empty address (address is Optional)
Backend: Health check endpoint returns healthy status
Frontend: Registration page shows 'Preencher depois' button below 'Cadastrar Estabelecimento'
Frontend: Clicking 'Preencher depois' without filling any field navigates to Dashboard
Frontend: After skip, Dashboard shows establishment with user's name as business_name
Frontend: After skip, Dashboard shows 0 stats (Visualizações, QR Gerados, Vendas, Ofertas)
Frontend: After skip, Dashboard shows R$ 0,00 balance with disabled 'Solicitar Resgate' button
Frontend: Category icons display correctly (no '?' symbols) - all 14 categories visible
Frontend: Dashboard 'Meu Perfil' action card is visible in Ações Rápidas with subtitle 'Editar dados, CEP e categoria'
Frontend: Dashboard 'Solicitar Resgate' button visible inside green credit card
Frontend: Existing establishment dashboard shows R$ 21,50 balance with pending withdrawal badge
critical_code_review_comments: register.tsx: handleSkip() correctly creates establishment with user's name or 'Meu Estabelecimento' as default
register.tsx: handleSkip() uses category 'other' as default when no category selected
register.tsx: Skip flow uses window.location.href for full page reload navigation
server.py: GET /api/categories returns 14 categories with valid Ionicons names (restaurant-outline, color-palette-outline, etc.)
server.py: POST /api/establishments accepts empty address string (address is Optional)
dashboard.tsx: 'Meu Perfil' action card correctly navigates to /establishment/offers
dashboard.tsx: 'Solicitar Resgate' button disabled when balance <= 0
seed_data_creation: Created test establishments via skip flow: test.skip.iter30@teste.com, test.skip.user2.iter30@teste.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 complete. All 'Preencher depois' skip button features working correctly. The skip button creates establishment with user's name as business_name and 'other' as category, then navigates to Dashboard. Category icons use valid Ionicons names (ending in -outline). Dashboard shows 'Meu Perfil' in Ações Rápidas and 'Solicitar Resgate' button in green credit card.

features_verified.skip_button_visible: WORKING - 'Preencher depois' button visible below 'Cadastrar Estabelecimento'
features_verified.skip_without_validation: WORKING - Clicking skip without filling fields navigates to Dashboard
features_verified.skip_creates_minimal_establishment: WORKING - Creates establishment with user's name and 'other' category
features_verified.category_icons: WORKING - All 14 categories display with valid Ionicons (no '?' symbols)
features_verified.dashboard_meu_perfil: WORKING - 'Meu Perfil' action card visible in Ações Rápidas
features_verified.dashboard_solicitar_resgate: WORKING - 'Solicitar Resgate' button visible in green credit card
features_verified.dashboard_zero_stats: WORKING - New establishment shows 0 for all stats
features_verified.dashboard_balance_display: WORKING - Shows R$ 0,00 for new, R$ 21,50 for existing establishment
